career.name: US Cyber Pipeline
career.title: Athlete
description: Selected among only 60 elite recruits nationwide for the US Cyber Pipeline program, a prestigious talent development initiative for future U.S. Cyber Team members.
Completed intensive advanced training in digital forensics, reverse engineering, web exploitation, and cryptography alongside top national high school and collegiate competitors.
Developed elite-level cybersecurity skills and strengthened high-performance team collaboration in a competitive environment designed to identify America's next generation of cyber defenders.

career.name: Foothill Cybersecurity Club
career.title: President
description: Created interactive cybersecurity activities and delivered technical presentations at weekly meetings to engage and educate club members.
Encouraged member participation in CTF competitions by promoting upcoming events, guiding sign-ups, and fostering a collaborative, competitive environment.

career.name: Foothill DECA
career.title: Junior Officer of Finance
description: Oversaw chapter budgeting and financial planning using Google Sheets, streamlining expense tracking and reimbursements for 100+ members.
Planned and executed the Chipotle fundraiser netting over $1,000 in profit, contributing directly to event funding and member subsidies.

career.name: Pleasanton Community of Character Collaborative
career.title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Built custom WIX Content Management System site with SEO optimization, UI improvements, and Google Analytics integration.
Enhanced user experience and performance tracking for community engagement platform.

career.name: World AI Forum (WAIFO)
career.title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Developed responsive webpages using HTML/CSS/JS within Content Management System, improving performance and SEO rankings.
Implemented Google reCAPTCHA and resolved backend vulnerabilities, reducing spam submissions significantly.
